title: BetterBlox
description: Changes certain blocks like grass to have their top texture on all sides, similar to Optifine's fancy grass, and compatible with all mods and resource packs.
body:
BetterBlox is a resource pack that puts the top texture of certain blocks on the whole side of it!\
Similar to Optifine's fast grass, but with more!\
Also works with any texture pack, even ones that aren't 16x16!\
Modified Blocks:\
Grass Block\
Snowy Grass\
Mycelium\
Podzol\
Dirt/Grass Path\
Warped Nylium\
Crimson Nylium

In update 0.7, Grass/Dirt paths now seamlessly spread onto the block below them for a more natural look!
![Grass/Dirt Path Spreading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/974c0c42a262aa2ad005901610b337233ddab625.png)

I hope you enjoy!\
[Bedrock Version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/betterblox-bedrock-edition/)!

FAQ

Am I allowed to use this in a modpack/collection/video etc.?\
Yes, just give me credit first.

Does this pack require anything?\
No, this pack does not require anything!

Any compatibility issues?\
There are no compatibility issues found.

Does this work with my mod/resource pack etc?\
Yes.

How can I make it work with my mod/resource pack? (Requires version 0.3+, and recommended with 0.4+)\
Easy! Just put the texture (like grass_block.png) in the folder, as long as it is not json code, use the pack, and it will work just like magic!
